validation_smoke.name: code.database.sqlite L3 validation smoke
signals: WAL mode and busy_timeout set per connection test
concurrent readers proceed while one writer commits (WAL) test
FTS5 query returns ranked matches test
online backup produces a consistent copy test

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.database.sqlite diagnosis smoke
signals: SQLITE_BUSY under concurrency with no busy_timeout
default rollback journal blocking readers during writes
foreign_keys pragma off so FK constraints silently ignored
copying a live .db file producing a corrupt backup
type affinity storing a string where a number was expected
